records.ety: [L. thus, better tus, frankincense. See Thurible.]

defs: The commoner kind of frankincense, or that obtained from the Norway spruce, the long-leaved pine, and other conifers.

records.ety: [OE. thus, AS. ðus; akin to OFries. & OS. thus, D. dus, and E. that; cf. OHG. sus. See That.]

defs: In this or that manner; on this wise.
quotes: Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him, so did he.
Thus God the heaven created, thus the earth.

defs: To this degree or extent; so far; so; as, thus wise; thus peaceble; thus bold.
quotes: Thus far extend, thus far thy bounds.
